AdvanceReleaseOfPrepaidInstances.relatedReleaseFlag: Whether to release the EIP and data disks attached to the instance at the time of release. Default: false. **Note:** Prepaid CDS disks associated with the instance will be forcibly released along with the instance.
AdvanceReleaseOfPrepaidInstances.deleteCdsSnapshotFlag: Whether to release cloud disk snapshots. Default: false, not released.
AdvanceReleaseOfPrepaidInstances.deleteRelatedEnisFlag: Whether to delete associated ENIs when the instance is released. Default: false, not deleted.
